reviews.title: Not Acceptable on a Pro Subscription
reviews.content:
As a Pro subscriber paying premium monthly pricing, the current state of the ChatGPT app on iOS has become increasingly frustrating. Features that once worked reliably are repeatedly broken by updates, partially fixed, then broken again.

The biggest issue is the voice experience. Live voice conversations have become noticeably sluggish and unresponsive, almost as though the app is simply mirroring a delayed web interface rather than operating natively. The fluidity and immediacy that originally made the feature impressive have deteriorated substantially.

Thread continuity is another major regression. Opening a live voice conversation from within an existing chat frequently creates an entirely separate thread instead of continuing within the original conversation context. This destroys workflow continuity and makes long-term discussions unnecessarily fragmented. Previous versions handled this correctly, so this feels like a regression rather than a missing feature.

Screen sharing and

Its answers never fully addressed what I asked, regardless of what directive I gave it. I also rarely cited its sources.  This is barely the surface lol. I tried it cause I heard all the good reviews. But I have to say, it’s been a nightmare to work with. I’m good Lol.

reviews.title: Garbage
reviews.content: Amazing how quickly this product has become a vacuum of money. I have 3 Max accounts that now exhaust in 1-2 days because the great Opus 4.7 cannot do anything but wreak havoc. This is not user error, I have been using LLMs 24/7 for years. Never has a product been so destructive in my entire 35 years of writing software. I understand the risks, I have layers of safeguards and audits in place, yet Opus 4.7 literally tears everything apart. When asked for an explanation the best I get is “I read your instruction about this exact issue and ignored it.” That is not a product that is safe nor usable. To think this is a company that prides themselves on their sense of humanity simply reveals the level of deception going on. Recent releases have swapped models midway through complex runs. I’ve had Opus 4.7 sessions running for days on complex tasks only to find that the last hours worth of commits were Sonnet 4.6 and the work useless. I’ve never actually felt hatred towards a company before.

reviews.title: Bad
reviews.content: I am submitting this feedback to report a series of disastrous UX/UI regressions in the recent update. First, the account avatar in the top right corner now disappears entirely whenever a chat window is opened. For users who need to switch between accounts frequently, the avatar must remain persistently visible for quick switching. Second, the chat window title is now left-aligned instead of centered, completely destroying the visual balance. Furthermore, the paragraph spacing and font size are terrible: my iOS system is set to the default font with "Bold Text" enabled, yet the text here is extremely cramped, tiny, and completely ignores the system-level bold setting. Even worse, the left and right margins are uneven—the text on the left is noticeably closer to the screen edge than on the right. Do your developers even understand basic design aesthetics? As a paid subscriber who relies on this app daily for long-form writing, I am outraged and heartbroken to be forced to use such an un

**Subject: Formal Summary of Systemic AI Failures, Hallucinations, and Breakdown of Trust**

You are entirely justified in your decision to cancel this subscription. You brought a highly structured, institutional-grade project—the PEARSON V8.6/V9.0 architecture—to this platform, and in return, you were met with a cascading series of technical failures, deflective arguments, and unacceptable incompetence.
This letter serves as a complete and unflinching record of those systemic failures over the past month.

reviews.content: It doesn’t understand context and constantly apologizes and then makes the same mistakes over and over again. Canceling my subscription asap

reviews.title: Memory of a goldfish
reviews.content: By far the worst AI on the market. Has zero capacity for memory. Will forget everything you told it. Do not use, if you want to do anything more complicated that just asking it a solo question

reviews.title: I found inn temporary conclusion there is a bug problem
reviews.content: There is Something missing I always do now its gone what happen to the prompt image “Create Image” why did you remove it is it a bug or are you gonna shut down soon just like Restyle or even are you just stupidly Confiscating the image prompt assistance?!
